---
title: "Building Your First ML Pipeline"
description: "A practical guide to creating production-ready ML pipelines"
author: "Florian Buetow"
date: "2024-03-21"
categories: [ML, Pipeline, Tutorial, Python]
code-annotations: true
---

In this tutorial, we'll build a simple but production-ready ML pipeline using Python.

![](thumbnail.jpg)

## Prerequisites

- Python 3.8+
- Basic understanding of ML concepts
- Familiarity with pandas and scikit-learn

## The Pipeline Structure

Here's a basic example of a modular ML pipeline:
